translation.支持开发者开发继续维护该项目: Support developers to develop and continue to maintain the project
translation.❤️❤️如果觉得项目不错，请打开上面链接👆🏻，点个STAR❤️❤️: ❤️❤️ If you think the project is good, please open the link above👆🏻 and give it a STAR❤️❤️
translation.请输入链接,仅支持.m3u以及.txt后缀链接: Please enter the link, only .m3u and .txt suffix links are supported
translation.请输入要检查的数据: Please enter the data you want to check
translation.新增分组: A new group has been added
translation.刷新后将跳转首页: After refreshing, you will be redirected to the home page
translation.需要点击【搜索】按钮进行筛选: You need to click the [Search] button to filter
translation.选择延迟最低的源: Select the source with the lowest latency
translation.排序(数据较多时,可能影响排序列表性能,建议分批操作): Sorting (If there is a large amount of data, the performance of the sorted list may be affected, so it is recommended to operate in batches)
translation.如果非http链接则跳过: If it's a non-http link, skip it
translation.是否需要去掉频道多余字符(比如\"[HD]CCTV1\"将去掉\"[HD]\"字: Should the extra characters in the channel name be removed (for example, "[HD]CCTV1" will remove the "[HD]" characters)
translation.相同名称保存条数(默认0全部保存， 设置大于0则保存相应数量频道): Number of channels to save with the same name (default 0 means save all; if set greater than 0, it will save the specified number of channels)
translation.网络上的频道名前后经常出现一些特殊字符，可以通过添加该配置将这些字符替换掉，提升: There are often some special characters before and after the channel name on the Internet. You can add this configuration to replace these characters and improve the tidiness of the channel name.
translation.比如频道名中出现“[HD]”，如果需要将这个字符去掉，添加一行：搜索值填写“[H: For example, if "[HD]" appears in the channel name and you need to remove this character, add a line: fill in "[HD]" for the search value and leave the replacement value blank.
translation.结果文件名: The name of the resulting file
translation.检查并发数: Check the number of concurrent transactions
translation.只看频道关键词: Just look at the channel keywords
translation.获取任务失败，请检查服务是否正常启动: If the fetch task fails, check whether the service starts normally
translation.请输入m3u8播放地址: Please enter the M3U8 playback address
translation.请输入待检查数据: Please enter the data to be checked
translation.输入框支持下面几种格式: The input box supports the following formats
translation.支持标准格式的m3u链接，如有多个请用英文逗号做分割符,比如: Supports standard format m3u links, if there are multiple, please use a comma as the separator, for example
translation.支持m3u文件原始内容，类似: Support original content of m3u files, similar to
translation.当前源来自github的iptv-org，如您有相关源链接，请至设置中添加: The current source is from iptv-org on GitHub. If you have relevant source links, please add them in the settings.
translation.当前设置的【后台检查server域名】为: The current setting for 【Background check server domain】 is
translation.对不起，您没有设置【后台检查server域名】，请至设置页面操作后再来查看: I'm sorry, you haven't set the 【Background check server domain】 yet. Please go to the settings page to set it up before checking again.
translation.暂无规则，请点击右上角添加: No rules yet, please add from top right
translation.上述链接内容经过繁体转简体以及特殊字符替换: The content of the above link has been converted from Traditional to Simplified Chinese and special characters have been replaced
translation.下面的关键词直接输入简体中文即可，无需担心原始源有繁体字问题而导致搜索不到: The following keywords can be directly input in simplified Chinese, and there is no need to worry about the problem of繁体字 in the original source and the inability to search
translation.请先上传或选择图片: Please upload or select an image
translation.确定要删除吗: Are you sure you want to delete?
translation.这是一个用于管理和检测 IPTV 频道的 Web 应用程序。: This is a Web application for managing and checking IPTV channels.
translation.配置定时任务，自动检测频道有效性。: Configure scheduled tasks to automatically check channel validity.
translation.管理您喜欢的频道，并查看爬取结果。: Manage your favorite channels and view crawl results.
translation.配置爬虫源、关键词替换和其他系统设置。: Configure crawler sources, keyword replacement, and other system settings.
translation.如果您觉得这个项目对您有帮助，请考虑赞助开发者一杯咖啡 ☕️: If this project helps you, please consider buying the developer a coffee ☕️
translation.请选择一种方式支持开发者 ☕️: Please choose a way to support the developer ☕️
translation.请选择一种方式支持开发者: Please choose a way to support the developer
translation.您的 Star 是我们最大的动力！: Your Star is our greatest motivation!
translation.前往 GitHub 点 Star: Go to GitHub and give a Star
